title: The Bond Boy
writer: George Washington Ogden, Charles E. Whittaker
actors: Richard Barthelmess, Charles Hill Mailes, Ned Sparks
plot: For the sake of his impoverished mother, Joe Newbolt bonds himself to harsh Isom Chase. Ollie Chase tires of the difficult life her husband has forced on her and plans to elope with Cyrus Morgan, but Joe's sense of honor forces hi...
